response.justification: Candidate brings valuable geospatial expertise from GISCollective and solid distributed-systems understanding from handling real-time data at scale. However, C++ experience is antiquated (2000-2001) with no modern C++ or Rust proficiency, and a 15-year career trajectory away from systems programming toward web development creates significant risk. The strong craftsmanship foundation offers potential for ramp-up, but the technical gap is substantial for a modern C++-primary role.
strengths: Deep geospatial and GIS expertise from GISCollective and Green Map work
Experienced with distributed systems handling real-time data at scale (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Demonstrated software craftsmanship with TDD, testing practices, and cross-domain problem-solving skills
concerns: C++ experience is from 2000-2001 (25 years old); no modern C++ (C++11+) or Rust shown
Career focus has shifted away from systems programming toward JavaScript/TypeScript and web development over past 15 years
No demonstrated routing systems or data pipeline optimization experience; GISCollective is for data collection, not navigation routing

key_factors.factor: Outdated C++ skills, no modern systems programming
Long-term career divergence from systems engineering
